description:
Contrast is weird

"Contact Us" text color is too dark, needs to be a lighter color
fix_summary: Careers page sidebar: Added explicit text-white class to the 'Contact Us' h3 heading inside the navy blue contact CTA card, ensuring proper white-on-dark contrast.

changes.summary: Added text-white class to h3.Contact Us inside the navy CTA card to ensure readable white text on dark background
